title: Faz's Roleplay Clothes
description: Add diferent clothes and costumes to Minecraft for Roleplay.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87b7258d10d42ca1cc86fe58fd0982d8bb02610d_0.webp)

                                  About Faz's Roleplay Clothes
The FazBrick Studios Team presents Faz's Roleplay Clothes. Maintained and kept up to date for modern versions of Minecraft and fully compatible with multiplayer.

This project focuses on add different kinds of clothes/costumes/accessories for the player to the game without interfering with the vanilla aspects at all. This mod includes a wide variety of accessories to customize and improve the appearance of players within Minecraft.

Dress up as a police officer, a firefighter, a judge, a builder, a plumber, a king... The possibilities are endless!

The mod is currently in the early stages of development and will be constantly updated adding new content and advancing versions.

                                        I can put this in Modpacks?
Of course! Feel free to add this mod to your modpacks. I encourage you to do so, just don't forget to give credit.

 

                                             What's in the Mod
Faz's Roleplay Clothes It currently adds a wide variety of clothing and accessories to the game. The following have been added to the latest version:

Judge Clothes

Policeman Clothes

Fire Fighter Clothes

Builder Clothes

Fat Plumber Cosplay

Chef Clothes

Different Types of Shoes

Jackets

Different Types of Face Accessories

Hazmat Cosplay

Dress

Prisoner Cosplay

And much more!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db5f96370b6814c183a46fef4c19559eb6036e6e.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95f6f57731bd652cd4f24012c64b7cbf4479d287_0.webp)
